componentDescription: CodeBlock is a read-only code display component with syntax highlighting, optional line numbers, and a copy button. Use it for displaying code examples, API responses, command-line instructions, and configuration snippets. For editable code, use CodeEditor.

usageExamples.title: Installation command
usageExamples.description: Shell command display with copy button.

usageExamples.title: API response example with title
usageExamples.description: JSON API response with filename and line numbers.
usageExamples.code:
<CodeBlock
  title="response.json"
  code={JSON.stringify(exampleResponse, null, 2)}
  language="json"
  showLineNumbers
  copyable
/>

usageExamples.title: Dark-themed code snippet in docs
usageExamples.description: TypeScript example in dark theme for documentation.
usageExamples.code:
<CodeBlock
  title="example.ts"
  code={`import { Button, ButtonType } from '@blend-ui/core';

function App() {
  return <Button buttonType={ButtonType.PRIMARY} text="Click me" />;
}`}
  language="typescript"
  theme="dark"
  showLineNumbers
  copyable
/>

code.llmContext: Required. The code string to display. Pass pre-formatted strings — use JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2) for JSON objects. For multi-line code, use template literals.
code.propDescription: Required. The code string to display

language.llmContext: Syntax highlighting language. Common values: 'bash', 'javascript', 'typescript', 'json', 'python', 'sql', 'yaml'. Match to the actual content type for correct token coloring.

copyable.llmContext: Set to true to show a copy-to-clipboard button. Always enable for installation commands, API keys, code snippets, and any content the user will likely want to copy. Do not set for decorative or trivially short displays.

showLineNumbers.llmContext: Set to true to display line numbers on the left margin. Use for code examples with 5+ lines where users might reference specific lines. Leave false for single-line commands and short snippets.
showLineNumbers.propDescription: Displays line numbers in the code block

title.llmContext: Optional filename or label shown above the code block (e.g., 'config.json', 'index.ts', 'Terminal'). Use for code from specific files to help users identify where the code belongs.
title.propDescription: Filename or label displayed above the code block

theme.llmContext: 'light' for documentation pages and standard UI. 'dark' for terminal output, developer tool contexts, or dark-themed documentation sites.
theme.propDescription: Color theme for the code block
